backstory.original: Zrang, his twin brother Kleeb, and their brood-sister Yassa began their Icewind Dale existence stealing gems and dreaming of being respected by the locals. Inspired by their mentor, Jarlaxle, they stand tall to form Hew Maan - who is totally a human and not on a nefarious mission to steal all the Champions' stuff.
backstory.display: 兹朗，他的双胞胎兄弟克莱布，和他们的同胞姐妹雅萨，开始了他们在冰风谷的生活。他们偷窃宝石，梦想被当地人尊重。在他们导师贾拉索的启发下，他们高高站起，组成了休马恩--如假包换的、不会从勇士们身上偷东西的人类。

description.original: The middle kobold shoots a random enemy with a small crossbow.
description.display: 中间的狗头人用小十字弩向一名随机敌人发射。

longDescription.original: The middle kobold shoots a random enemy with a small crossbow.
longDescription.display: 中间的狗头人用小十字弩向一名随机敌人发射。

description.original: The Kobolds pepper a random enemy with bolts. The effect of Zrang's Teamwork is doubled for 30 seconds.
description.display: 狗头人向一名随机敌人连发弩矢。兹朗的团队合作效果翻倍，持续 30 秒。

longDescription.original: The Kobolds pepper a random enemy with bolts and Zrang's Teamwork is doubled for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 狗头人向一名随机敌人连发弩矢，同时兹朗的团队合作效果翻倍，持续 30 秒。

description.pre: Depending on where they are placed in the formation, a different kobold takes the top slot in the trench coat and provides a different buff:^{Zrang}#955d81 $(hewmaan_zrang_inactive)- $(hewmaan_front_x_columns) - Enemies have a $(amount___2)% chance to drop double quest items or count for double quest progress.^{Kleeb}#992920 $(hewmaan_kleeb_inactive)- $(hewmaan_middle_x_columns) - Increases the damage of Champions against boss enemies by $(amount___3)%. If the boss has hits-based or armor-based health, successful attacks destroy twice as many segments as they normally would.^{Yassa}#d39322 $(hewmaan_yassa_inactive)- $(hewmaan_back_x_columns) - Increases the damage of Champions within two columns of Hew Maan by $(amount___4)%

基于其在阵型中的位置，另外一个狗头人会出现在堑壕斗篷的头部，并提供不同增益：^{兹朗}#955d81 $(hewmaan_zrang_inactive)- $(hewmaan_front_x_columns) - 敌人有 $(amount___2)% 几率掉落双倍任务物品，或奖励双倍任务进度。^{克莱布}#992920 $(hewmaan_kleeb_inactive)- $(hewmaan_middle_x_columns) - 勇士们对首领敌人的伤害提升 $(amount___3)%。如果首领的生命值附带攻击次数或护甲，有效攻击将对护甲产生双倍效果。^{雅萨}#d39322 $(hewmaan_yassa_inactive)- $(hewmaan_back_x_columns) - 距离休马恩 2 列内的勇士伤害提高 $(amount___4)%

tipText.original: Hew Maan provides different buffs depending on their proximity to the front of the formation.
tipText.display: 休马恩依据勇士与阵型前线的距离提供不同的增益。

conditions.desc: Increases the effect of {Kleeb}#992920 and {Yassa's}#d39322 Teamwork abilities based on the number of Champions of the most populous species in the formation:^1-3 others: +100%^4-5 others: +700%^6-7 others: +3100%^8+ others: +12700%

Increases the effect of {Kleeb}#992920 and {Yassa's}#d39322 Teamwork abilities based on the number of other lawful Champions in the formation:^1-3 others: +100%^4-5 others: +700%^6-7 others: +3100%^8+ others: +12700%

Increases the effect of {Kleeb}#992920 and {Yassa's}#d39322 Teamwork abilities based on the number of other unaffiliated Champions in the formation:^1-3 others: +100%^4-5 others: +700%^6-7 others: +3100%^8+ others: +12700%

Increases the effect of {Kleeb}#992920 and {Yassa's}#d39322 Teamwork abilities based on the number of human Champions in the formation:^1-3 others: +100%^4-5 others: +700%^6-7 others: +3100%^8+ others: +12700%

tipText.original: Hew Maan buffs their abilities based on the number of "other" humans in the formation.
tipText.display: 休马恩根据阵型中的“其他”人类数量来强化自身各自的技能。

description.desc: Increases the effect of {Zrang's}#955d81 Teamwork ability by $(amount)% for each Champion adjacent to the kobolds (stacks additively and then applied to Teamwork multiplicatively).
每有一位与狗头人们相邻的勇士，即提升{兹朗}#955d81的团队合作技能效果 $(amount)%（以加算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式对团队合作技能生效）
The effect of all Teamwork abilities are increased by $(amount)%
所有团队合作技能的效果提升 $(amount)%

name.original: Did We Say Humans? We Meant...
name.display: 我们说人类了吗？我们的意思是......

description.pre: The Hello, Fellow Humans ability now uses the most populous species in your formation instead of Humans.
“你们好，人类同胞”技能现在基于阵型中种族人数最多的勇士数量而非人类勇士数量。

specializationName.original: Did We Say Humans? We Meant...
specializationName.display: 我们说人类了吗？我们的意思是......

specializationDescription.original: Hew Maan cozies up with the most common species in the party.
specializationDescription.display: 休马恩刻意结交队伍中数量最多的种族。

description.pre: The Hello, Fellow Humans ability now uses the number of Lawful Champions in the formation instead of Humans.

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

description.pre: “你们好，人类同胞”技能现在基于阵型中守序勇士数量而非人类勇士数量。

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

specializationDescription.original: Hew Maan cozies up with the lawful Champions in the party.
specializationDescription.display: 休马恩刻意结交队伍中的守序勇士。

description.pre: The Hello, Fellow Humans ability now uses the number of unaffiliated Champions in the formation instead of Humans

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

description.pre: “你们好，人类同胞”技能现在基于阵型中无从属组织勇士数量而非人类勇士数量。

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

specializationDescription.original: Hew Maan cozies up with the unaffiliated Champions in the party.
specializationDescription.display: 休马恩刻意结交队伍中的无从属组织勇士。

description.desc: The two kobolds that are not on top provide lesser buffs passively. These abilities are not buffed by Hello, Fellow Humans.^{Zrang}#955d81 $(hewmaan_please_stand_by_zrang_inactive)- Boss enemies move $(amount___2)% slower^{Kleeb}#992920 $(hewmaan_please_stand_by_kleeb_inactive)- Hits-based enemies have a 50% chance of spawning with $(amount___3)% of their hits already gone (rounded down)^{Yassa}#d39322 $(hewmaan_please_stand_by_yassa_inactive)- Reduces the base attack cooldown of Champions adjacent to the kobolds by $(amount___4)s

不从风衣中冒头的两名狗头人会被动提供次要增益，效果不会被“你们好，人类同胞”技能强化。^{兹朗}#955d81 $(hewmaan_please_stand_by_zrang_inactive)- 首领敌人移动速度减缓 $(amount___2)%^{克莱布}#992920 $(hewmaan_please_stand_by_kleeb_inactive)- 生命值附带攻击次数的敌人有 50% 几率在刷新时使自身的所需攻击次数减少 $(amount___3)%（向下取整）^{雅萨}#d39322 $(hewmaan_please_stand_by_yassa_inactive)- 与狗头人们相邻的勇士减少基本攻击冷却时间 $(amount___4) 秒
Unlocks Hew Maan's Roll Out! Ultimate Attack.

conditions.desc: ^^The Kobolds pepper a random enemy with bolts. An additional effect is provided depending on which kobold is on top:^{Zrang}#955d81 - The effect of Zrang's Teamwork is doubled for 30 seconds.^{Kleeb}#992920 - Non-boss enemies are stunned and no additional enemies will spawn for 15 seconds.^{Yassa}#d39322 - Reduce any active ultimate cooldowns of all Champions in the formation by 25%.

description.desc: 解锁休马恩的“出动！”杀招攻击。

conditions.desc: ^^狗头人向一名随机敌人连发弩矢，并根据站在上面的狗头人产生额外效果效果：^{Zrang}#955d81 - 兹朗的团队合作效果翻倍，持续 30 秒。^{Kleeb}#992920 - 非首领敌人会被眩晕，15 秒内不会出现额外的敌人。^{Yassa}#d39322 - 使阵型中所有勇士的主动杀招冷却时间降低 25%。

description.original: I'll take socks, err watch. I'll take watch. ~Zrang
description.display: 我就袜子吧，呃我是说守夜。对我负责守夜。~兹朗

description.original: For Termalaine! ~Hew Maan
description.display: 塔马兰万岁！~休马恩

description.original: You go first. ~Kleeb
description.display: 你先来吧。~克莱布

description.original: Zrang? He got frozen on patrol one too many times. ~Yassa
description.display: 兹朗？他常常在巡逻时整个冻僵了。~雅萨

description.original: Is anyone else feeling the cold? ~Zrang
description.display: 你们都不觉得冷吗？~兹朗

description.original: You got this, Kleeb! Just don't growl! ~Yassa
description.display: 克莱布你行的！记得不要吼出声！~雅萨

description.original: We've learned to stay REAAAAAALLY still ~ Yassa
description.display: 我们学会了坚~~~决不动~雅萨

description.original: But I want to SEE! ~Yassa
description.display: 但我想看！--雅萨

description.original: It's MY turn to be in charge! ~Kleeb
description.display: 该轮到我指挥了！~克莱布

description.original: Greetings, fellow humans!
description.display: 你们好，人类同胞！

effects.description: Increases the number of other champions counted by Hello, Fellow Humans by $amount

description.original: Kleeb prefers fire going in opposite direction! ~Kleeb
description.display: 克莱布更喜欢相反方向的火力！克莱布

description.original: Surprises around every corner! But not this one. I don't think. ~ Kleeb
description.display: 每个角落都有惊喜！但这里没有。应该吧。~克莱布

effects.description: Increases game speed by $amount% when the formation is not under attack

description.original: Isn't that what other humans say? ~Yassa
description.display: 其他人不就是这么说话的吗~雅萨

effects.description: Increases Yassa's Teamwork buff by $amount%

description.original: Zrang? Nope. Never heard of 'em. ~Zrang
description.display: 兹朗？没有，我没听说过这个人。——兹朗

effects.description: Enemies that attempt to attack this Champion will instead attack a different Champion, if possible.

description.original: Agents Zrang, Kleeb, and Yassa, ready! We're a triple threat!
description.display: 兹朗特工、克莱布特工和雅萨特工，做好准备！我们是三重威胁！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each Unaffiliated Champion in the formation

description.original: Is it dry yet? ~Kleeb, Yassa, and Zrang
description.display: 它干了没有？~克莱布，雅萨和兹朗

description.original: We're melting! Why are we heavy!? Abandon Hew Maan! ~Hew Maan
description.display: 我们快融化了！我们为什么这么重！？快丢掉休马恩！~休马恩

description.original: Jarlaxle inspired us to roast. RISE! I meant rise. ~Zrang
description.display: 贾拉索鼓舞了我们烧烤。站起来！我是说站起来。~兹朗

description.original: More kobolds is more better! ~Yassa
description.display: 狗头人越多越好！~雅萨

description.original: See that knot right here? I tied that. ~Yassa
description.display: 看到这里的这个结没？我打的。~雅萨

description.original: The sling was invented by a kobold. You didn't know that? ~Kleeb
description.display: 投石器是狗头人发明的。你不知道吗？~克莱布

description.original: Ishi helped me tighten the string. Now it shoots! ~Yassa
description.display: 这弦是伊希帮我上紧的。现在它能射了！~雅萨

description.original: More crossbows is more better! ~Kleeb
description.display: 十字弩越多越好！~克莱布

description.original: You need to use our Champion name! ~Zrang
description.display: 你得用我们的勇士名！~兹朗

description.original: The dragon flew right over us! But then we had to run. ~Kleeb
description.display: 龙就从我们头顶飞过！但后来我们不得不逃跑。~克莱布

description.original: Penelope is our friend too! ~Kleeb, Yassa, and Zrang
description.display: 佩内洛普也是我们的朋友！~克莱布，雅萨和兹朗

description.original: Once he stamped it, it was cannon, errr law! LAW! ~Zrang
description.display: 他一旦盖上章，这就成了大炮，呃，法律！是法律！~兹朗

description.original: Lazaapz said she already had a set. ~Kleeb
description.display: 拉扎普说她已经有一套了。~克莱布

description.original: I hide it with my other special things ~Zrang
description.display: 我把它跟我其他特别的东西藏在一起。~兹朗

description.original: More rocks is more better! ~Zrang
description.display: 石头越多越好！~兹朗

description.original: Penelope said they create rainbows that make the clouds go away. ~Yassa
description.display: 佩内洛普说他们制造了能让云飘走的彩虹。~雅萨

description.original: I liked the town. But then it got stomped by the dragon. ~Yassa
description.display: 我很喜欢这个镇子。但后来龙把它给踏平了。~雅萨

description.original: Did you know I was once proposed, err possessed by a ghost? ~Zrang
description.display: 你知道吗？我曾经被一个幽魂求过婚，呃，是上过身。~兹朗

description.original: Eyes out for the walker. Run away - from its light. No, really. RUN!~Yassa
description.display: 当心那个助行架。快跑，离它的光远点。不，真的，快跑！~雅萨

description.original: We're so heroic! ~Yassa
description.display: 我们可真英勇！~雅萨

description.original: Yassa said I needed to start a hobby ~Kleeb
description.display: 雅萨说我得开始培养点兴趣。~克莱布

name.display: 克莱布手工制作的翅膀

description.original: I'm a genius. ~Kleeb
description.display: 我真是个天才。~克莱布

description.original: I liked Zrang better when he was possessed by the ghost. ~Kleeb
description.display: 我更喜欢兹朗被那个幽魂上身时的样子。~克莱布

description.original: If Deekin gets wings, Hew Maan wants wings! ~Kleeb
description.display: 如果德金有翅膀，那休马恩也想要有翅膀！~克莱布

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Kobold Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Ranged Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Zrang, his twin brother Kleeb, and their brood-sister Yassa began their Icewind Dale existence stealing gems and dreaming of being respected by the locals. Inspired by their mentor, Jarlaxle, they stand tall to form Hew Maan - who is totally a human and not on a nefarious mission to steal all the Champions' stuff.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Hew Maan provides three different buffs that are useful in different situations, depending on where they are located in the formation.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 兹朗，他的双胞胎兄弟克莱布，和他们的同胞姐妹雅萨，开始了他们在冰风谷的生活。他们偷窃宝石，梦想被当地人尊重。在他们导师贾拉索的启发下，他们高高站起，组成了休马恩--如假包换的、不会从勇士们身上偷东西的人类。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 休马恩提供三种不同增益。根据他们在阵型中的位置，能在不同的情况下发挥作用。

original.name: Crossbow Bolt
original.description: The middle kobold shoots a random enemy with a small crossbow.
original.long_description: The middle kobold shoots a random enemy with a small crossbow.

display.name: 十字弩矢
display.description: 中间的狗头人用小十字弩向一名随机敌人发射。

display.name: 洗衣日斗篷
display.description: 它干了没有？~克莱布，雅萨和兹朗

original.name: Cloak of the Surprise Storm
original.description: We're melting! Why are we heavy!? Abandon Hew Maan! ~Hew Maan

display.name: 意外的风暴斗篷
display.description: 我们快融化了！我们为什么这么重！？快丢掉休马恩！~休马恩

original.name: Termalaine Trench Coat
original.description: Jarlaxle inspired us to roast. RISE! I meant rise. ~Zrang

display.name: 塔马兰堑壕斗篷
display.description: 贾拉索鼓舞了我们烧烤。站起来！我是说站起来。~兹朗

original.name: Adventurer's Cloak
original.description: More kobolds is more better! ~Yassa

display.name: 冒险斗篷
display.description: 狗头人越多越好！~雅萨

original.name: Basic Sling
original.description: See that knot right here? I tied that. ~Yassa

display.name: 基础投石器
display.description: 看到这里的这个结没？我打的。~雅萨

original.name: Quality Kobold Engineering
original.description: The sling was invented by a kobold. You didn't know that? ~Kleeb

display.name: 优秀狗头人工程学
display.description: 投石器是狗头人发明的。你不知道吗？~克莱布

original.name: Yassa's Crossbow
original.description: Ishi helped me tighten the string. Now it shoots! ~Yassa

display.name: 雅萨的十字弩
display.description: 这弦是伊希帮我上紧的。现在它能射了！~雅萨

original.name: Hew Maan's Walking Sticks
original.description: More crossbows is more better! ~Kleeb

display.name: 休马恩的手杖
display.description: 十字弩越多越好！~克莱布

original.name: Naming Thing
original.description: You need to use our Champion name! ~Zrang

display.name: 命名之事
display.description: 你得用我们的勇士名！~兹朗

original.name: Ten-Town Refugee Badge
original.description: The dragon flew right over us! But then we had to run. ~Kleeb

display.name: 十镇难民徽章
display.description: 龙就从我们头顶飞过！但后来我们不得不逃跑。~克莱布

original.name: Proof of Friendship
original.description: Penelope is our friend too! ~Kleeb, Yassa, and Zrang

display.name: 友谊的证据
display.description: 佩内洛普也是我们的朋友！~克莱布，雅萨和兹朗

original.name: Volo's Writ for Hew Maan
original.description: Once he stamped it, it was cannon, errr law! LAW! ~Zrang

display.name: 瓦罗给休马恩的文书
display.description: 他一旦盖上章，这就成了大炮，呃，法律！是法律！~兹朗

original.name: Tools of the Trade
original.description: Lazaapz said she already had a set. ~Kleeb

display.name: 谋生的工具
display.description: 拉扎普说她已经有一套了。~克莱布

original.name: The One Rock
original.description: I hide it with my other special things ~Zrang

display.name: 唯一的石头
display.description: 我把它跟我其他特别的东西藏在一起。~兹朗

original.name: Zrang's Rock Pile
original.description: More rocks is more better! ~Zrang

display.name: 兹朗的石头堆
display.description: 石头越多越好！~兹朗

original.name: Rainbow Eggs
original.description: Penelope said they create rainbows that make the clouds go away. ~Yassa

display.name: 彩虹蛋
display.description: 佩内洛普说他们制造了能让云飘走的彩虹。~雅萨

original.name: Homeowners Badge
original.description: I liked the town. But then it got stomped by the dragon. ~Yassa

display.name: 房东徽章
display.description: 我很喜欢这个镇子。但后来龙把它给踏平了。~雅萨

original.name: Ten-Towns Memory
original.description: Did you know I was once proposed, err possessed by a ghost? ~Zrang

display.name: 十镇回忆
display.description: 你知道吗？我曾经被一个幽魂求过婚，呃，是上过身。~兹朗

original.name: Lullaby Doll
original.description: Eyes out for the walker. Run away - from its light. No, really. RUN!~Yassa

display.name: 摇篮曲娃娃
display.description: 当心那个助行架。快跑，离它的光远点。不，真的，快跑！~雅萨

original.name: The Battle of Termalaine
original.description: We're so heroic! ~Yassa

display.name: 塔马兰之战
display.description: 我们可真英勇！~雅萨

original.name: Kleeb's Arrow
original.description: Yassa said I needed to start a hobby ~Kleeb

display.name: 克莱布的箭
display.description: 雅萨说我得开始培养点兴趣。~克莱布

original.name: Kleeb's Crafted Wing
original.description: I'm a genius. ~Kleeb

display.name: 克莱布手工制作的翅膀
display.description: 我真是个天才。~克莱布

original.name: Trex's Wing
original.description: I liked Zrang better when he was possessed by the ghost. ~Kleeb

display.name: 特雷克斯的翅膀
display.description: 我更喜欢兹朗被那个幽魂上身时的样子。~克莱布

original.name: Dragon Disciple Dreams
original.description: If Deekin gets wings, Hew Maan wants wings! ~Kleeb

display.name: 龙脉术士的梦想
display.description: 如果德金有翅膀，那休马恩也想要有翅膀！~克莱布

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Kobold Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位狗头人勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Ranged Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位远程勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
